title: stenoloma viride
intro: Stenoloma viride, also known as the green Stenoloma, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenoloma viride include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its soothing and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Stenoloma viride can be made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in tinctures and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
